data.title: Covid vaccine critic appointed to lead federal review team amid protest from CDC staff over misinformation.
data.description: Members of the panel have received an extensive mandate, despite multiple requests from employees at the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention to urge Robert F. Kennedy Jr. to cease spreading inaccurate information.

data.title: Six Panitch Schwarze lawyers named 'Best Lawyers,' 'Ones to Watch' in IP in PA and DE. Aug. 22, 2025. (Word count: 11)
data.description: Six IP attorneys from Pennsylvania and Delaware have been honored for their exceptional work in patent law and IP and patent litigation. Panitch Schwarze Belisario & Nadel LLP based in Philadelphia made the announcement on August 22, 2025. These attorneys have been recognized for their excellence in the 2026 edition of The Best...

data.title: Macy’s board announces quarterly dividend declaration.
data.description: The latest report reveals that the country's economy grew by 3.5% in the second quarter of this year compared to the same period last year. This growth was primarily driven by a 5% increase in consumer spending, with a notable surge in the purchase of durable goods. Additionally, business investments also saw a significant rise of 7.2%, indicating growing confidence in the market. On the downside, exports declined by 2% due to global trade uncertainties. Unemployment rate stands at 4.1%, the lowest in the past decade, showcasing a robust labor market. Inflation remains steady at 2.3%, below the target set by the central bank. Overall, the economic outlook seems positive, with analysts projecting continued growth in the upcoming quarters.

data.title: Coinbase predicts stablecoin era to reach trillion-dollar status by 2028, amid global government interest.
data.description: On Thursday, a forecast was released amidst growing attention from numerous governments globally towards stablecoins.

data.title: 17 McCathern, Shokouhi, Evans attorneys named in The Best Lawyers in America and Best Lawyers: Ones to Watch.
data.description: In Dallas on August 22, 2025, the law firm McCathern, Shokouhi, Evans (McCathern PLLC) revealed that 17 of their attorneys have been acknowledged as The Best Lawyers in America and Best Lawyers: Ones to Watch in America. The firm's spokesperson expressed immense pride in their attorneys' recognition by these esteemed publications.

data.title: INDOCHINO launches Fall/Winter 2025 collection in Vancouver. Emphasizes refined details in modern suits.
data.description: INDOCHINO, the leading global provider of custom-tailored suits, introduces its Fall/Winter 2025 collection in Vancouver, BC on August 22, 2025. This line pays homage to the timeless art of tailoring and represents a continuation of the brand's legacy. Instead of following trends, INDOCHINO focuses on perfecting details to create refined garments.

data.title: Inventor creates TIPS disposable applicator for lace wig glue. Provides precise, fast application.
data.description: On August 22, 2025, in Pittsburgh, an inventor from Stockbridge, Georgia, discussed the creation of a new applicator designed to simplify the process of applying glue for lace front wigs/hairpieces. The inventor explained that the TIPS device was developed to offer accurate and quick glue application, streamlining the process for users. The innovative design aims to enhance efficiency and convenience for individuals using glue for wigs/hairpieces.
